public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as hostler.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a hostler still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of hostler in and around The Tattered Banner, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep The Tattered Banner workable through the obligations of hostler while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around The Tattered Banner, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of hostler visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Taren Stone can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Taren Stone needs help with a problem in The Tattered Banner that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Taren Stone carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: The Tattered Banner: the part of The Tattered Banner where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break

first_impression: Taren Stone presents as Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a hostler still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Hostler, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Taren Stone refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Hostler too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Taren Stone can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Taren Stone adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Taren Stone is Known locally through day-to-day work as hostler. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Hostler.
